subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy letter was received, and its contents testified to the utmost joy and fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید مضمون دلالت بر نهایت روح و ریحان مینمود
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
